name: codex-plugin
description: FailureReport Root MCP skill for durable failure investigation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Create and resume durable failure reports through Root MCP.
interface.longDescription: FailureReport helps Codex turn a software failure into an evidence-backed, GitHub Issue-shared investigation and handoff through the public Root MCP interface.
interface.defaultPrompt: Investigate this software failure through the configured FailureReport Root MCP server.
